description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark, rich wood grain finish. The front features two large glass sliding doors in the upper section, revealing multiple interior shelves for storage or display, while the lower section consists of open shelving and possibly drawers or compartments. A thin metallic accent, likely brass or gold-colored, runs horizontally across the front, adding a touch of elegance. The sides and back are solid wood panels with no visible openings or features. The overall design is rectangular and robust, suitable for use in offices, living rooms, or public urban interiors such as libraries or lobbies. The cabinet appears to be heavy and sturdy, with ample space for storing books, documents, or decorative items.
description: A large, dark wood cabinet with glass sliding doors and open shelving, accented by a metallic strip. It is robust and suitable for storage or display in urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing glass sliding doors, interior shelves, open lower compartments, and a metallic accent strip.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Back view showing a plain, continuous wood panel with no access points or decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid wood panel and no visible features.
